channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: My Junior Can Explain It. My Senior Can Defend It. The AI Just... Did It.
item.description: Ninety-four percent test coverage on our React component library. Storybook running clean. The kind of coverage that lets you sleep at night when you're responsible for components shipping across...

item.title: Google TPU 8 vs Nvidia: 8t and 8i Specs Explained
item.description: TL;DR: Google's TPU 8 is not one chip. It is two: an 8t for training and an 8i for inference. The 121 ExaFlops number is the headline. The split is the story. It is the quietest way possible for...

item.title: X is going to let Grok curate your timeline
item.description: X is putting its AI chatbot, Grok, in charge of your timeline. In an announcement on Wednesday, X product head Nikita Bier says Premium subscribers on iOS can get early access to a feature that...

item.title: Anthropic's New Update on Designing AI: How Claude Is Being Built for the Future
item.description: ** Introduction** Anthropic, the AI safety company behind the Claude family of models, has been reshaping the AI industry not just by building powerful language models, but by rethinking how AI...

item.title: Open Problems META-DB (Rei-AIOS): D-FUMT8 META-Classification of 713 Open Problems (Rei-AIOS Paper 130)
item.description: This article is a re-publication of Rei-AIOS Paper 130 for the dev.to community. The canonical version with full reference list is in the permanent archives below: Zenodo (DOI, canonical):...

item.title: Lets just... yeet the entire rulebook on hooks
item.description: Just finished writing some docs on a feature I was writing while waiting for the compilation process to finish. I'm not even going to change a single word. It goes over each rule, explains the...

item.title: Chapter 3: The Tokenizer - Text to Numbers and Back
item.description: What You'll Build A Tokenizer class that converts between characters and integer IDs, plus a special BOS (Beginning of Sequence) token. Depends On Nothing. This chapter is independent of Chapters...

item.title: Cross Cloud Multi Agent Comic Builder with ADK, Amazon Lambda, and Gemini CLI
item.description: Leveraging the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK) and the underlying Gemini LLM to build low code apps with the Python programming language deployed to the Lambda service on AWS. Aren’t There a...

item.title: Privacy-first mind mapping app. Part 1: Constraints Before Tech
item.description: I started with a romantic idea: build the entire product in Rust, with Rust‑first tools, end to end. I still like that idea philosophically. In practice, it was too much for one person and too far...

item.title: I Ditched iCloud Photo Sharing and Built My Own (with an AI partner)
item.description: iCloud shared albums take 26+ seconds to load on my 300 Mbps fiber connection. I timed it. Apple, a trillion-dollar company, built something that is embarrassing to show people. Other photo...

item.title: Créer un système d’authentification avec PHP et MySQL (étape par étape)
item.description: Introduction: Dans ce tutoriel, je vais expliquer comment j’ai créé un système simple d’authentification en utilisant PHP, MySQL, HTML et CSS. Ce projet permet aux utilisateurs de s’inscrire, se...

item.title: Tesla’s revenue rises again as it prepares for more AI and robotics
item.description: Tesla released its 2026 first-quarter financial earnings today, providing another look at the progress of Elon Musk's $1 trillion bet to transform his company into a leader of AI and robotics....

item.title: AI failure could trigger the next financial crisis, warns Elizabeth Warren
item.description: "I know a bubble when I see one." That's what Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-MA), who led the push to create a new consumer financial regulator in the wake of the 2008 recession, told a crowd at a...

item.title: OpenAI now lets teams make custom bots that can do work on their own
item.description: OpenAI is giving users of its Business, Enterprise, Edu, and Teachers plans access to cloud-based "workspace" agents available in ChatGPT that can perform business tasks. In its blog post, OpenAI...

item.title: Alexis Ohanian shocks Washington with pro-immigration remarks
item.description: Hello and welcome to Regulator, a newsletter for Verge readers about tech politics, political tech, and how they're muddying the waters of Washington, DC. My birthday is this week, and if you're...

item.title: How SpaceX preempted a $2B fundraise with a $60B buyout offer
item.description: Cursor was on track to close a $2 billion funding round this week but chose to halt discussions after SpaceX offered a $10 billion "collaboration fee" and a path to a $60 billion acquisition.

item.title: Microsoft issues emergency update for macOS and Linux ASP.NET threat
item.description: When authentication fails, things can go very, very wrong.

item.title: Former MrBeast exec sues over ‘years’ of alleged harassment
item.description: A former employee of Jimmy "MrBeast" Donaldson has filed a lawsuit alleging that she faced "intentional infliction of emotional distress" from harassment at the YouTuber's production company, was...

item.title: Google Cloud launches two new AI chips to compete with Nvidia
item.description: Google's newest TPUs are faster and cheaper than the previous versions. But the company is still embracing Nvidia in its cloud — for now.

item.title: 5 AI Models Tried to Scam Me. Some of Them Were Scary Good
item.description: The cyber capabilities of AI models have experts rattled. AI’s social skills may be just as dangerous.

item.title: Ember’s self-heating smart mug is more than $50 off ahead of Mother’s Day
item.description: Coffee is what gets many of us through the workday, and a proper smart mug can keep it hot for hours so you can maintain your focus without constantly getting up to reheat your cup. Thankfully, if...

item.title: Malicious KICS Docker Images and VS Code Extensions Hit Checkmarx Supply Chain
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have warned of malicious images pushed to the official "checkmarx/kics" Docker Hub repository. In an alert published today, software supply chain security company Socket...

item.title: Watch Sony’s elite ping-pong robot beat top-ranked players
item.description: Humans have been building ping-pong playing robots for decades, such as Omron's FORPHEUS that challenged amateur competitors at CES 2017. What sets Ace apart from the rest is that the robot, which...

item.title: Self-Propagating Supply Chain Worm Hijacks npm Packages to Steal Developer Tokens
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a fresh set of packages that have been compromised by bad actors to deliver a self-propagating worm that spreads through stolen developer npm tokens. The...

item.title: Google turns Chrome into an AI co-worker for the workplace
item.description: Google brings Gemini-powered "auto browse" capabilities to Chrome for enterprise users, letting workers automate tasks like research, data entry, and more.

item.title: Google makes an interesting choice with its new agent-building tool for enterprises
item.description: Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform takes an interesting approach: It is geared for IT and technical users.

item.title: Anthropic’s Mythos rollout has missed America’s cybersecurity agency
item.description: Several US federal agencies are taking up Anthropic's new cybersecurity model to find vulnerabilities, but one is reportedly not getting in on the action: the nation's central cybersecurity...

item.title: AI Overviews are coming to your Gmail at work
item.description: The AI Overviews will offer instant summaries pulled from across multiple emails.

item.title: AI Tools Are Helping Mediocre North Korean Hackers Steal Millions
item.description: One group of hackers used AI for everything from vibe coding their malware to creating fake company websites—and stole as much as $12 million in three months.

item.title: Gemma 4 VLA Demo on Jetson Orin Nano Super
